allow: Bash(sed -i 's/f""{n} \\/ {len\(available_fields\)} colonne selezionate  ✎""/tr\(""columns_n_of_m"", n, len\(available_fields\)\)/g' geopoint_manager_dialog.py)
Bash(sed -i 's/f""{len\(field_names\)} \\/ {len\(field_names\)} colonne selezionate  ✎""/tr\(""columns_n_of_m"", len\(field_names\), len\(field_names\)\)/g' geopoint_manager_dialog.py)
Bash(sed -i 's/f""{n} \\/ {len\(self._available_fields_cache\)} colonne selezionate  ✎""/tr\(""columns_n_of_m"", n, len\(self._available_fields_cache\)\)/g' geopoint_manager_dialog.py)
Bash(sed -i 's/GeoPoint Manager v5\\.1$/GeoPoint Manager v5.2/' geopoint_manager_dialog.py)
Bash(sed -i "s/GeoPoint Manager - v5\\.1''/GeoPoint Manager - v5.2''/" geopoint_manager_dialog.py)
Bash(sed -i 's/<h3>GeoPoint Manager v5\\.2<\\/h3>/<h3>GeoPoint Manager v5.2<\\/h3>/' geopoint_manager_dialog.py)
